channel.title: science on Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in science on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: Notes on Perception for Design
item.description: These are concise notes I took based on the excellent, scientifically-rigorous textbook Information Visualization: Perception for Design by Colin Ware. I created this PDF using LaTeX, which allowed me the flexibility to create an easy-to-edit, elegant, and compact document layout. I highly recommend the book and these notes for anyone that needs to create data visualizations. Download here
